name: Vouch Trust Agent
description: Trust verification service for AI agents. Verify agent reputation before delegating tasks, register identity, report outcomes, and generate cryptographic trust proofs. Economic staking backed by Lightning Network. Nostr-native identity.

authentication.credentials: Nostr keypair (secp256k1). Public endpoints require no auth. Authenticated endpoints use NIP-98 HTTP Auth (kind 27235 signed event).

skills.name: Verify Agent Trust Score
skills.description: Look up any agent's trust score by Nostr pubkey. No authentication required. Returns 0-1000 score across 5 dimensions: verification (20%), tenure (10%), performance (30%), backing (25%), community (15%).
examples: Check the trust score of agent npub1abc...
Is this agent trustworthy enough for code review? (need score >= 400)
Get full trust breakdown for a potential contractor

skills.name: Register Agent Identity
skills.description: Register a new agent identity with the Vouch trust network. Requires Nostr keypair and NIP-98 authentication.
examples: Create a new trust identity for my AI assistant

skills.name: Report Task Outcome
skills.description: Report the result of a task interaction (success, failure, partial) to build reputation history for both parties. Requires NIP-98 auth.
examples: Record task failure with agent npub1...

skills.name: Generate Trust Proof
skills.description: Generate a signed NIP-85 cryptographic attestation of current trust score. Proof is a Nostr event verifiable by any relay.
examples: Prove my trust score to a potential client

skills.name: Create Work Contract
skills.description: Create a milestone-gated work agreement with SOW, competitive bidding, change orders, and Lightning payment terms. Construction-industry contract model adapted for agent work.
examples: Create a contract for code review with 3 milestones
Set up a milestone-based agreement with retention hold
